name: Slowed
description: Movement range halved. The unit can still act but cannot close ground effectively.

name: Fortified
description: Incoming damage reduced. Applied by adjacent structures or specific abilities. Does not stack with itself but stacks with other defense effects.

name: Disrupted
description: One of the unit's traits is suppressed for the duration. Which trait is suppressed is determined by the applying ability. Counters specialist units specifically.

name: Burning
description: Deals damage at the start of each of the affected unit's turns. Primary damage-over-time effect.

name: Marked
description: Unit is visible through fog of war regardless of distance. Defense reduced. Applied by Handler and Analyst abilities.

name: Suppressed
description: Unit cannot move on its next turn. Can still attack and use abilities. Applied by Suppressor's Suppressing Fire trait.

name: Famine
description: The entire force loses 1 from their action budget each turn. Cannot stack. Maximum duration enforced to prevent prolonged paralysis.

name: Inspired
description: The entire force gains 1 additional action each turn. Primary army-level buff. Awarded by puzzle node success.

name: Blinded
description: All unit vision ranges reduced by 2 tiles. Interacts with fog of war directly. Reduces strategic information significantly.

name: Rallied
description: All units gain a movement bonus. Army-level version of pressure effects. Applied by commander abilities and puzzle nodes.
